title: delivery worker fetches private key per post per inbox
description: In delivery.rs process_batch(), crate::persona::get_private_key() is called inside the per-delivery-item loop (line 225). This means for a post fanned out to 500 inboxes, it runs 500 identical SELECT queries for the same private key PEM. The private key should be fetched once per (post, persona) and reused across all deliveries for that post in the batch. The key is immutable for the lifetime of a persona, so caching it for the batch is safe.
close_reason: Delivery worker now caches post data per post_id in a HashMap within process_batch
